overview.description: The NEOS Gold High Income ETF (IAUI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in gold commodities. The fund is actively managed, seeking high monthly income by investing in gold ETPs, combined with synthetic options and covered call strategy. IAUI was launched on Jun 5, 2025 and is issued by Neos.
